KG0_note: KG0 gates BEFORE KG1: extraction-clean >=90% AND flobi's 20/20 eyeball. If KG0 fails -> STOP, iterate plumbing, new pilot (no hypothesis claim).
A0_hint: median_item_seconds * n gives wall-clock; pick n_ID/n_OOD1 under ~8h (§7)
HALT_boundary: PILOT COMPLETE — the machine STOPS here (PREREG_v2 §9). Human reads KG0 + KG1 + timing, does the 20/20 grading eyeball, then commits A1 (SPAN freeze) + A0 (sizes) as SEPARATE ratified commits, and only THEN fires the main run.
